note: Phase D: verification is lint + production build + the automated Playwright QA suite (frontend/e2e, owner-approved 2026-07-18, automates manual QA steps 1-9 against a network-mocked backend; step 10 remains the build command). The backend suite runs as a no-regression tripwire — this phase must not touch backend files. Manual QA against a live stack remains recommended before production deploys.
